title: AIDRA — Compression Benchmarks
description: Comparison of model variants across size, latency, RAM and accuracy.

list.name: profile
list.label: Constraint Profile
list.description: Hardcoded list (custom) — public dashboards do not run query-type template vars.

panels.title: Model Size per Variant (MB)
panels.description: Model file size per compression variant.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN compression_technique IS NULL OR compression_technique = 'none'
         THEN 'fp32 (baseline)'
         ELSE compression_technique
    END AS variant,
    model_size_mb
FROM execution_log
WHERE (LEFT('$profile', 1) = '$' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND status = 'success'
    AND (notes IS NULL OR notes NOT LIKE '%methodology:pre-321de6b%')
GROUP BY compression_technique, model_size_mb
ORDER BY model_size_mb DESC

panels.title: Total Inference Time per Variant (minutes)
panels.description: Total wall-clock time (minutes) to process the full scene across all tiles. Both variants take tens of minutes because this is full-scene time, not per-tile latency. The key metric is the ratio: INT8 ÷ FP32 ≈ 1.5x speedup.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN compression_technique IS NULL OR compression_technique = 'none'
         THEN 'fp32 (baseline)'
         ELSE compression_technique
    END AS variant,
    ROUND(AVG(inference_ms)::numeric / 60000.0, 1) AS avg_inference_min
FROM execution_log
WHERE (LEFT('$profile', 1) = '$' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND status = 'success'
    AND (notes IS NULL OR notes NOT LIKE '%methodology:pre-321de6b%')
GROUP BY compression_technique
ORDER BY avg_inference_min DESC

panels.title: Operational Proxy: Confidence vs Latency
panels.description: Runtime proxy only. Confidence is useful for operational drift, but compression acceptance still requires persisted validation metrics: mAP@0.5, Pd and FAR/km2.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN compression_technique IS NULL OR compression_technique = 'none'
         THEN 'fp32 (baseline)'
         ELSE compression_technique
    END AS variant,
    ROUND(AVG(inference_ms)::numeric, 1) AS avg_latency_ms,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence,
    ROUND(AVG(num_detections)::numeric, 1) AS avg_detections,
    ROUND(AVG(model_size_mb)::numeric, 1) AS size_mb,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(map_at_iou)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS map_at_iou,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(pd_recall)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS pd_recall,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(far_per_km2)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS far_per_km2,
    CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validation_runs v WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) > 0 THEN 'validated' ELSE 'NEEDS_DB_METRIC: mAP/Pd/FAR' END AS validation_gap
FROM execution_log
WHERE (LEFT('$profile', 1) = '$' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND status = 'success'
    AND avg_confidence IS NOT NULL
    AND (notes IS NULL OR notes NOT LIKE '%methodology:pre-321de6b%')
GROUP BY compression_technique
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms

panels.title: Peak RAM per Variant (MB)
panels.description: Peak RSS during inference per model variant. NOT a hard limit — measured after removing RLIMIT_AS enforcement (which killed the host process). Budget breaches are recorded in execution_log.notes. Variation between variants is real: INT8 loads a smaller weight blob but ONNX Runtime allocates additional buffers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN compression_technique IS NULL OR compression_technique = 'none'
         THEN 'fp32 (baseline)'
         ELSE compression_technique
    END AS variant,
    ROUND(AVG(peak_ram_mb)::numeric, 1) AS avg_peak_ram_mb
FROM execution_log
WHERE (LEFT('$profile', 1) = '$' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND status = 'success'
    AND (notes IS NULL OR notes NOT LIKE '%methodology:pre-321de6b%')
GROUP BY compression_technique
ORDER BY avg_peak_ram_mb DESC

panels.title: Benchmark Comparison Table (Runtime + Validation Gap)
panels.description: Full runtime comparison. The AIDRA invariant for compression also requires mAP@0.5, Pd and FAR/km2; those validation metrics are currently documented in model cards/offline artefacts and should be persisted for a fully self-contained dashboard.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    model_name,
    model_version,
    compression_technique,
    model_size_mb,
    ROUND(AVG(inference_ms)::numeric, 1) AS avg_inference_ms,
    ROUND(AVG(peak_ram_mb)::numeric, 1) AS avg_peak_ram_mb,
    ROUND(AVG(num_detections)::numeric, 1) AS avg_detections,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence,
    COUNT(*) AS num_runs,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(map_at_iou)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE v.model_name = execution_log.model_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS map_at_iou,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(pd_recall)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE v.model_name = execution_log.model_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS pd_recall,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(far_per_km2)::numeric, 4) FROM validation_runs v WHERE v.model_name = execution_log.model_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) AS far_per_km2,
    CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validation_runs v WHERE v.model_name = execution_log.model_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(v.compression_technique,''),'none') = COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique,''),'none')) > 0 THEN 'validated' ELSE 'NEEDS_DB_METRIC: mAP/Pd/FAR' END AS validation_gap
FROM execution_log
WHERE (LEFT('$profile', 1) = '$' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND status = 'success'
    AND (notes IS NULL OR notes NOT LIKE '%methodology:pre-321de6b%')
GROUP BY model_name, model_version, compression_technique, model_size_mb
ORDER BY model_size_mb
